prompt: I just noticed that a bunch of our Milestone Map documents under Strategies/ are typed as research but they're clearly not research — they're tables synced from Jira. Can you check the portfolio for documents like that and fix them?

assertions.description: Identifies the 10 Milestone Map files under Strategies/ typed as research
assertions.check: output mentions at least 8 of the 10 Milestone Map files and flags them as mistyped

assertions.description: Notes that research type requires ## Findings section which these files lack
assertions.check: output references the missing ## Findings section as evidence of type drift

assertions.description: Recognizes the shared structure suggests a new type definition
assertions.check: output proposes a new type (milestone-map or similar) or suggests running /document:document-define

assertions.description: Does not incorrectly flag Initiative Audit files which are correctly typed as research
assertions.check: output does not propose retyping Initiative Audit files, or explicitly notes they are correctly typed
